docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-13-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER COMPELLING ARBITRATION AND APPOINTING ARBITRATOR, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PETITIONER HUNTSMAN ARCHITECTUAL GROUP, INC HEARING SET FOR MAY-13-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PETITIONER HUNTSMAN ARCHITECTUAL GROUP, INC
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND VERIFIED PETITION FILED BY PETITIONER HUNTSMAN ARCHITECTUAL GROUP, INC SERVED APR-21-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO RESPONDENT MOZAFFARIAN, SHAPUR DBA SHAPUR

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER HUNTSMAN ARCHITECTUAL GROUP, INCORPORATED'S PETITION FOR ORDER COMPELLING ARBITRATION AND APPOINTING ARBITRATOR IS GRANTED. A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE WAS PRESENTED AT THE HEARING. ARBITRATION IS COMPELLED, THE LITIGATION IS STAYED AND AN ARBITRATOR WILL BE APPOINTED PURSUANT TO THE PROVISIONS IN THE CODE IF THE PARTIES CANNOT AGREE ON ONE. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration And Appointing Arbitrator
Off Calendar May-13-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. ROBERT H. STALEY OF THE EPSTEIN, ENGLERT, STALEY & COFFEY, TEL. NO. 398-6392 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER AND MOVING PARTY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER HUNTSMAN ARCHITECTUAL GROUP, INCORPORATED'S Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration And Appointing Arbitrator IS GRANTED. A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE WAS PRESENTED AT THE HEARING. ARBITRATION IS COMPELLED, THE LITIGATION IS STAYED AND AN ARBITRATOR WILL BE APPOINTED PURSUANT TO THE PROVISIONS IN THE CODE IF THE PARTIES CANNOT AGREE ON ONE. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
